MCP_BEARER_TOKEN.description: **Leave this blank.** The Worker auto-generates a bearer token on first request and stores it in KV. You can override later with `wrangler secret put MCP_BEARER_TOKEN`.

OPTIONAL_WEBHOOK_URL.description: Optional. Provide a webhook URL if you want event notifications, otherwise leave blank.

VECTOR_INDEX.description: Vector index for semantic search. Uses `@cf/baai/bge-base-en-v1.5` (768 dimensions, cosine metric). The form will ask you to fill these in manually.
